mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RCA.TB_ANOMALOUS_TRAFFIC SELECT NULL, STRIFID, STRRESID, STRTYPEMIN, INTTIMESTAMP, INTYEAR , INTMONTH, INTDAY, INTHOUR, INTMIN, INTWEEK , INTBANDWIDTH, FLTBPSIN, FLTBPSOUT, FLTPPSIN, FLTPPSOUT , FLTERRORIN, FLTERROROUT, FLTDISCARDIN, FLTDISCARDOUT, FLTUNKNOWN , FLTUSAGE, FLHCINOCTETS, FLHCOUTOCTETS, FLHCINUCASTPKTS, FLHCOUTUCASTPKTS , FLHCINMULTICASTPKTS, FLHCOUTMULTICASTPKTS, FLHCINBROADCASTPKTS, FLHCOUTBROADCASTPKTS, FLTBPSINMAX , FLTBPSOUTMAX, FLTPPSINMAX, FLTPPSOUTMAX, FLTERRORINMAX, FLTERROROUTMAX , FLTDISCARDINMAX, FLTDISCARDOUTMAX, FLTUNKNOWNMAX, FLTUSAGEMAX FROM IP_YD.XE_CVNMS_PERF_IF WHERE STRIFID = #{strifid} AND INTTIMESTAMP = #{inttimestamp}

INSERT INTO RCA.TB_NOXIOUS_TRAFFIC SELECT NULL, STRRESIP, STRRESNAME, STRS_IP, STRS_PORT, STRD_IP , STRD_PORT, STRS_MAC, STRD_MAC, STRPROTOCOL, STRIPV4TOS , STRCHANNEL, STRSENDERIP, STRIN_INTERFACE, STROUT_INTERFACE, STRBYTES_COL , STRCOUNTS, DATEREGDATE FROM IP_YD.XE_SFLOW_LOG WHERE DATEREGDATE = #{dateregdate}
